steps.title: Compare increasing and decreasing time
steps.content: From the graph, Theresa's speed increases from $0$ to $5$ minutes and from $20$ to $25$ minutes. That is $10$ total minutes increasing.

steps.title: Find the false statement
steps.content: Her speed decreases from $10$ to $20$ minutes and from $25$ to $30$ minutes, for $15$ total minutes decreasing. The statement saying her speed increased for longer than it decreased is not true. The answer is B.
